hero.title: A safe crypto home where growth stays human
hero.subhead: FamBIT welcomes people who want to learn carefully, verify first, and grow together without hype.

paragraphs: FamBIT starts with a simple idea: family helps family. Newcomers and experienced members meet in one calm space where questions are welcome and pressure is not.
Before any next step, we return to verification and clear public guidance. That rhythm protects people from noise, scams, and rushed decisions.

whatThisMeans.title: What this means
items: You verify official channels before you trust messages.
You ask for clarity when something feels urgent.
You choose steady learning over emotional reactions.
You help others use the same safe routine.

trust.microcopy: Trust is built by verification, not urgency.
